originalTitle: Live RL Research on PufferLib w/ Joseph Suarez
title: Testing Mingru Architecture Against Baseline on 2048 Environment
summary: Merged Kyouong's 2048 environment PR into Puffer 4 and debugged optimizer discrepancies between torch Muon and heavy ball momentum. Achieved matching learning curves after fixing num mini batches and optimizer settings, validating the Mingru architecture's performance.
